Hello Dear
 
I am Mark Leonard  from  new York here in new York international airport here in America ok, 
Last week I was going round the airport Authority stores,   and I found your  found a luggage box that was   abandoned in the store,  and on the  box, your email address was on it.
 
So you have to come and receive yours, or we will destroy it with others.
 
This year,  we don't want to keep such understand and abandoned luggage's here anymore,
 
For more information contact me for collection ok.
Expecting to hearing from you.
Mark Leonard,
Email: wwwofficedetails@gmail.com
